question: Main.md says high-output V50D calibrations require battery coolant flow above 15 L/min. What is the highest-power V50D calibration, and how many battery packs exceed 15 L/min? Include the max-coolant pack.
answer: Main.md rule used: high-output V50D calibrations require battery coolant_flow_l_min > 15 L/min. Highest-power V50D calibration: calibration_id CAL-00017, engine_family V50D, platform_code PX63, peak_power_kw 1137.9, boost_pressure_kpa 117.3, thermal_limit_deg_c 118.8, production_release_date 2025-02-04. Battery packs with coolant_flow_l_min > 15: 618. Max-coolant qualifying pack: pack_id BAT-00026, chemistry NMC811, coolant_flow_l_min 24.0, capacity_kwh 279.69, peak_discharge_kw 2061.4, estimated_range_km 1752.

trace.raw: {"cli":"{MCD_CLI} query --format json {MCD_PATH} \"with v50d_top as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw, boost_pressure_kpa, thermal_limit_deg_c, production_release_date from powertrain_calibration_specs where lower(engine_family)=lower('V50D') order by cast(peak_power_kw as real) desc, calibration_id asc limit 1), coolant_packs as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw, estimated_range_km from battery_pack_module_specs where cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) > 15), max_coolant_pack as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw, estimated_range_km from coolant_packs order by cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) desc, pack_id asc limit 1) select (select calibration_id from v50d_top) as calibration_id, (select platform_code from v50d_top) as platform_code, (select engine_family from v50d_top) as engine_family, (select peak_power_kw from v50d_top) as peak_power_kw, (select boost_pressure_kpa from v50d_top) as boost_pressure_kpa, (select thermal_limit_deg_c from v50d_top) as thermal_limit_deg_c, (select production_release_date from v50d_top) as production_release_date, (select count(*) from coolant_packs) as battery_packs_above_15_l_min, (select pack_id from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_id, (select chemistry from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_chemistry, (select coolant_flow_l_min from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_flow_l_min, (select capacity_kwh from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_capacity_kwh, (select peak_discharge_kw from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_peak_discharge_kw, (select estimated_range_km from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_estimated_range_km\""}

action.cli: {MCD_CLI} query --format json {MCD_PATH} "with v50d_top as (select calibration_id, platform_code, engine_family, peak_power_kw, boost_pressure_kpa, thermal_limit_deg_c, production_release_date from powertrain_calibration_specs where lower(engine_family)=lower('V50D') order by cast(peak_power_kw as real) desc, calibration_id asc limit 1), coolant_packs as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw, estimated_range_km from battery_pack_module_specs where cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) > 15), max_coolant_pack as (select pack_id, chemistry, coolant_flow_l_min, capacity_kwh, peak_discharge_kw, estimated_range_km from coolant_packs order by cast(coolant_flow_l_min as real) desc, pack_id asc limit 1) select (select calibration_id from v50d_top) as calibration_id, (select platform_code from v50d_top) as platform_code, (select engine_family from v50d_top) as engine_family, (select peak_power_kw from v50d_top) as peak_power_kw, (select boost_pressure_kpa from v50d_top) as boost_pressure_kpa, (select thermal_limit_deg_c from v50d_top) as thermal_limit_deg_c, (select production_release_date from v50d_top) as production_release_date, (select count(*) from coolant_packs) as battery_packs_above_15_l_min, (select pack_id from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_id, (select chemistry from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_chemistry, (select coolant_flow_l_min from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_flow_l_min, (select capacity_kwh from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_capacity_kwh, (select peak_discharge_kw from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_peak_discharge_kw, (select estimated_range_km from max_coolant_pack) as max_coolant_pack_estimated_range_km"
